evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Maintain high standards for data quality and consistency; Establish governance frameworks and best practices; Trusted, accurate, consistent reporting
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour dominates: 'Maintain high standards for data quality and consistency' and 'Establish governance frameworks and best practices' outweigh a single 'fast-paced' mention in requirements by more than 2×.
evidence.domain_risk: Act as analytics partner to Finance, Product, Commercial, Clinical, and Leadership teams; Hilo by Aktiia addresses high blood pressure, which causes 18M deaths each year
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Regulated healthcare domain (blood pressure monitoring) with explicit Clinical team partnership and financial reporting/forecasting responsibilities pushes to high.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Own and evolve Hilo's Metabase platform as the central reporting source; Partner with Data Engineering on data architecture
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named tools in responsibilities ('Own and evolve Hilo's Metabase platform') and a separate Data Engineering team indicate an existing but still-growing data function — mid maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: Own and evolve Hilo's Metabase platform as the central reporting source; Champion data-driven culture across the organization
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Tool-specific precision ('Own and evolve Hilo's Metabase platform') sits alongside generic bullets ('champion data-driven culture', 'collaborate with business leaders'), making this mixed.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Act as analytics partner to Finance, Product, Commercial, Clinical, and Leadership teams; Analyze customer acquisition, engagement, retention, and monetization
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Responsibilities explicitly span commercial (acquisition/retention/monetization), finance (forecasting/scenario modeling), and product analytics with genuinely equal weight across all three.
evidence.autonomy_level: Define and execute the BI roadmap aligned with company objectives; Own and evolve Hilo's Metabase platform
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Strategic verbs 'Define and execute the BI roadmap' and 'Own and evolve' indicate direction-setting ownership rather than execution in service of others.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Define and execute the BI roadmap; Own and evolve Hilo's Metabase platform as the central reporting source
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mixed: building the BI roadmap from scratch ('define and execute') while also evolving an existing Metabase platform ('own and evolve').
evidence.work_arrangement: operates as a hybrid/remote-first organization headquartered in Neuchatel, Switzerland
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The JD's tool stack (Metabase, Power BI, Tableau, Snowflake) is traditional BI with no mention of AI coding tools or GenAI-consuming infrastructure.
evidence.testing_framing: Maintain high standards for data quality and consistency; Establish governance frameworks and best practices
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: The candidate personally maintains quality standards and establishes governance frameworks, an ownership framing consistent with the responsibility classification.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Hilo by Aktiia addresses high blood pressure, which causes 18M deaths each year; Act as analytics partner to Finance, Product, Commercial, Clinical, and Leadership teams
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The regulated healthcare/clinical context combined with cross-functional trust in accurate reporting positions compliance and stakeholder-trust concerns as dominant, consistent with high loss aversion.
